title: With Sora shuttered, smaller video AI apps surge into the spotlight
description: A week after OpenAI said it would shutter its artificial intelligence video generator, Sora, rival tools like Kling AI and RunwayML are already gaining ground.
content:

title: SpaceX's business and finances: Rockets, satellite communications and budding AI
description: SpaceX is gearing up for a massive stock market debut, potentially the largest ever. The Elon Musk-led company is known for its rocket launches and Starlink internet service. SpaceX is also developing its Starship for lunar and Mars missions. Recent financial reports show significant revenue growth. The company's acquisition of xAI further expands its reach into artificial intelligence.

title: India Pioneers AI Education for Future Innovators
description: Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan has launched an artificial intelligence curriculum for classes 3 to 8, embedding structured AI education within the school system. This initiative aims to lay a strong foundation for students to engage with emerging technologies, fostering critical thinking and innovation aligned with global technological advancements.
content: In a groundbreaking move, Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan has launched an artificial intelligence and computational thinking curriculum for classes 3 to 8. This initiative represents a significant step in embedding structured AI education... [809 chars]

title: Google faces calls to prohibit AI videos for kids on YouTube
description: Alphabet Inc.'s Google is facing demands from child development experts to prohibit videos created with artificial intelligence from being shown or recommended to young viewers across YouTube and YouTube Kids.
